problem_id: Two-Way Interoperability between the Single Window System and Department Systems
team_name: UBID Fabric — Deterministic Interoperability Layer for Karnataka's SWS and Department Systems
summary: Design a layer that propagates service requests both ways between Karnataka's Single Window System and the legacy department systems, using the Unique Business Identifier (UBID) as the common join key.
key_steps: Data integration using webhooks, APIs, or bulk data exports
Conflict resolution using mathematically proven algorithms
Automatic propagation of changes to all relevant systems
Creation of a unified event backbone and evidence graph for traceability
optimization_claims: Reducing schema mapping time from 2–3 days to 2–3 hours
Efficient responses to RTI queries about data processing decisions
constraints_addressed: Split-brain problem in Karnataka's e-governance infrastructure
Lack of shared event bus, common identity layer, conflict resolution protocol, and audit mechanism
